mentions.note: Turnaround story: 32% earnings growth, 5.6% SSS beat (vs. 2.4% exp.), raised FY revenue guidance, earnings at high end of forecast. Trades 15x FY earnings, 3.6% dividend yield; cheap entry on home-run quarter despite initial selloff.
New management showing early success; terrific performance 3 months ago likely to repeat; comps reset and old magic returning.
Finally hit after big pre-war rally; consumer weakness showing.
